config_meta.notes: First school_district jurisdiction. Edlio sections are YEAR-PAGINATED (one subpage per school year, back to ~2010); the 2026-06-04 spike checked a single empty landing subpage and wrongly concluded agendas were not published — they ARE, on per-year subpages (operator-verified 2026-06-11). Config now points at section ROOTS and the edlio scraper sweeps every year subpage. Minutes are Google Docs (export?format=pdf via redirect; some links 410-Gone); agendas likewise; Meeting Presentations are direct PDFs (mapped to packet_url).

records_custodian.name: Open Records Officer
records_custodian.title: Columbia County School District
records_custodian.notes: Primary intake is the NextRequest portal (https://ccboe-ga.nextrequest.com/requests/new). ERRATUM 2026-06-11 (audit): the district's own Open Records page ALSO publishes contactus@ccboe.net (Cloudflare-obfuscated mailto, 'please email contactus@ccboe.net' for portal-process questions) — a deliverable general mailbox, recorded here so requests/digests have an email channel and the contact monitor can verify it. The 2026-06-04 'no emailable custodian' claim was wrong (cf-obfuscation is publication). Phone (706) 541-0650, fax (706) 447-2105.

public_comment.notes: Primary channel: the district's 'Public Participation Request Form' (online, 24-hour pre-meeting registration deadline), governed by Board Policy BCBI. ALTERNATIVE channels for those who miss the deadline or cannot attend (operator-verified 2026-06-11): email a statement to contactus@ccboe.net, or leave a message at (706) 541-2723 ext. 5202. The district also hosts standalone special-topic public hearings (annual tax rate, budget adjustments) with dedicated floor time. Implication for TownWatch: the live-forum digest CAN be emailed (contactus@ccboe.net) in addition to directing citizens to the form. Speaker registration window/rules live on the Rules of Conduct for Public Participation page.

officials_roster.notes: Board of Education member directory. Verify member count + posts/districts during first onboarding pass.

meeting_agendas_minutes.notes: Agendas AND minutes both published, year-paginated back to ~2010/2011 (operator-verified 2026-06-11; the 2026-06-04 spike saw only an empty landing subpage). Each link is a Google Doc; fetch via /export?format=pdf (civic_get follows the googleusercontent redirect); some old links are 410-Gone. Meeting Presentations (slide decks/proposals, direct PDFs) ride along as packet_url.

campaign_finance.notes: Elected Board of Education members file campaign disclosures; pre-2027 destination TBD.

public_comment_policy.deadline: one week prior to the regular meeting
public_comment_policy.exclusions: disciplinary/under-review matters; off-topic, irrelevant, repetitious, or derogatory comments ruled out of order
public_comment_policy.notes: Policy-based, not statutory (OMA does not mandate public comment). Context for the forum config; not an audit finding.
